scripts.fetch-tokens: mkdir -p styles public && curl -s -o styles/tokens.css https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stresslee/design-system/main/build/css/tokens.css && curl -s -o public/tokens-dark.css https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stresslee/design-system/main/build/css/tokens-dark.css && cp styles/tokens.css public/tokens.css && echo '✅ 토큰 동기화 완료'
